faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started

delai.question: How long does it take to build our website?
delai.answer: It typically takes 2 to 4 weeks for a showcase website, and 4 to 8 weeks for an e-commerce store or a web application, depending on the complexity.

prix.question: How much does a website cost?
prix.answer: Pricing depends entirely on your project's scope and feature requirements. Contact us with your project details to receive a free, personalized quote.

maintenance.question: Do you offer post-launch maintenance services?
maintenance.answer: Yes, we provide monthly maintenance plans that cover technical updates, backups, security patches, and support for future changes.

hebergement.question: Do you handle hosting and domain names?
hebergement.answer: Yes, we can manage the domain registration and setup your hosting infrastructure, or guide you through the process if you prefer managing it yourself.

modifications.question: Can we request changes after the website goes live?
modifications.answer: Absolutely, a few rounds of revisions are included post-launch. Any revisions beyond that can be billed hourly or included in a ongoing maintenance package.

seo.question: Will our website rank well on Google?
seo.answer: Every single website we build is fully optimized technically for SEO (load speeds, clean structure, metadata). We can also provide advanced SEO strategies upon request.

mentions.metaDescription: Legal notice of the WebAgency website.
mentions.title: Legal Notice

sections.heading: Website Publisher
sections.body: This website is published by [Your Full Name or Studio Name], sole proprietorship (under registration process), located at [Your Address]. SIRET Number: [to complete upon registration]. Contact: [your email].

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website (text, graphics, source code, visual identity) is protected by copyright law. Any reproduction without prior consent is strictly prohibited.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: The publisher strives to ensure the accuracy of the information provided on this site, but cannot be held liable for errors, omissions, or the consequences of its use.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy and data protection of the WebAgency website.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.heading: Collected Data
sections.body: When using our contact form, we collect: your name, email address, phone number (optional), company name (optional), and your message's text.

sections.heading: Purpose of Processing
sections.body: This data is exclusively used to respond to your inquiries or quote requests. It is never sold or shared with third parties for commercial use.

sections.heading: Recipients and Processors
sections.body: Data transits securely through Resend (email delivery service) to allow us to reply. No other third-party companies have access to your data.

sections.heading: Data Retention Period
sections.body: Your data is kept for the time strictly necessary to handle your request, and is deleted afterwards unless a legal contractual relationship is established.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: In accordance with GDPR, you hold the right to access, rectify, or request the erasure of your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at [your email].

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: This website currently does not use any advertising tracking or analytical cookies.
